description: Improved Operational Stability for the Distributed Credit Card Core Banking System

headline: China Construction Bank: Improved Operational Stability for the Distributed Credit Card Core Banking System
description: Improved Operational Stability for the Distributed Credit Card Core Banking System

about.name: Distributed Credit Card Core Banking System
Galaxy Kylin Advanced Server Operating System V10

articleBody: As a state-owned banking institution in China, the credit card core banking system of China Construction Bank (CCB) serves many customers and handles credit on a tremendous scale. CCB upgraded its original infrastructure (x86+Red Hat+Oracle) by leveraging the Galaxy Kylin Advanced Server Operating System V10, GaussDB, and TaiShan 200 servers. The solution built a distributed credit card core banking system running on both ARM and x86 platforms, supporting microservice-based agile processing and massive data processing for distributed jobs. Benefits include cost-effectiveness, high processing efficiency, scalability, strong error tolerance, and overall security and reliability.
